meta.notes: All cost formulas are parameterized. Variables defined in cost_formula_variables section. Rates reflect 2024–25 Indian market rates.

cost_formula_variables.E: Equipment cost per day (INR) — crane: 8000, excavator: 5000, concrete pump: 6000, transit mixer: 3500
cost_formula_variables.P: Penalty per delay day (project-specific, default 5000 INR/day)
cost_formula_variables.OT: Overtime hours per worker per day beyond 8 hrs

general_action_model.description: Universal schema every action follows. All cost formulas reference variables above.

schema.name: string — snake_case unique identifier
schema.phase: enum — pre_construction | site_prep | foundation | structure | masonry | mep | finishing | external | handover | operations | workforce | scheduling | quality | risk | strategy | meta
prerequisites: list of action names that must be done first
enables: list of action names unlocked after this
schema.parallelisable: bool — can run simultaneously with sibling actions
schema.max_workers: number — beyond which productivity doesn't scale

cost_model.unit: string — per sq.ft | per m³ | per rm | per day | lumpsum | per unit
cost_model.example_calc: string — worked example for a 1500 sq.ft G+1 house
cost_model.contingency_pct: number — % to add on top (risk buffer)

risk_factors: list of things that can increase cost/time
schema.output_artifact: string — what is produced (report, physical work, approval, etc.)
quality_checks: list of QC steps before marking complete

actions.name: verify_land_title
actions.description: Engage a property lawyer to verify title deeds, encumbrance certificate, khata, and revenue records for 30 years.
actions.when_used: Before purchasing or commencing any work on a plot.

actions.name: conduct_soil_investigation
actions.description: Perform Standard Penetration Test (SPT) bore holes, lab analysis of soil samples for bearing capacity (SBC), liquid limit, and plasticity index.
actions.when_used: Before structural design and foundation planning.

actions.name: run_topography_survey
actions.description: Total station survey to establish site benchmarks, contour lines, and elevation differences for cut-fill analysis.

actions.name: perform_utility_scan
actions.description: Ground Penetrating Radar (GPR) scan and utility company records check for water, sewer, gas, HT/LT power lines.
risk_factors: high clay content reducing GPR accuracy

actions.name: check_fsi_far
actions.description: Verify Floor Space Index, Floor Area Ratio, setbacks, height restrictions, and usage zoning under BBMP/BDA/CMC bylaws.

actions.name: prepare_architectural_drawings
actions.description: Prepare floor plans, elevations, sections, site plan, and 3D renders. Includes concept, schematic, and construction document stages.

actions.name: prepare_structural_drawings
actions.description: RCC/Steel structural design per IS codes — column sizes, beam schedules, slab thickness, footing dimensions, bar-bending schedules.
risk_factors: soft soil requiring deep foundation redesign
quality_checks: Third-party structural peer review for buildings > 15m

actions.name: prepare_mep_drawings
actions.description: Design electrical single-line diagrams, plumbing isometrics, HVAC layout, fire fighting system, ELV/data points.

actions.name: estimate_budget
actions.description: Prepare Bill of Quantities with material take-offs, labour rates, equipment costs, contractor margins, and contingency.
actions.when_used: After design is frozen, before execution.

actions.name: submit_approvals
actions.description: Submit building plans, ownership docs, NOCs to BBMP/BDA/BMRDA for building permission. Includes fire NOC, OC application.

actions.name: obtain_fire_noc
actions.description: Obtain No Objection Certificate from Fire Department for buildings above 15m or assembly/commercial occupancy.
actions.when_used: Before construction if mandatory; else before OC.

actions.name: approve_go_no_go
actions.description: Formal client-PM-consultant meeting to review feasibility, budget, legal clearance, and authorize project start.

actions.name: fence_site
actions.description: Erect GI sheet hoarding or chain-link fencing, install entrance gate, signage, and safety boards.

actions.name: demolish_existing_structure
actions.description: Mechanical and manual demolition, debris segregation, recycling of steel, and disposal of rubble.

actions.name: strip_topsoil
actions.description: Strip 150–300mm top organic layer and stockpile for reuse in landscaping.

actions.name: setup_temp_facilities
actions.description: Install site office, labour camp, material storage yard, temporary power (DG/BESCOM temp connection), water tanker, sanitation, and first-aid.

actions.name: mark_layout
actions.description: Transfer architectural grid to ground using total station, string lines, and lime powder. Establish column centre points, wall lines, and reference benchmarks.
actions.output_artifact: Ground layout with column centres pegged

actions.name: mobilize_equipment
actions.description: Transport and commission excavator, JCB, concrete pump, transit mixer, scaffolding, and other plant.

cost_model.example_calc: Excavator+concrete pump for 1 day mobilization: (5000+6000)*1*1.2 = 13200 INR

actions.name: bulk_excavation
actions.description: Machine excavation for basement, lift pit, or raft foundation using hydraulic excavator.
quality_checks: Bottom level check with dumpy level

actions.name: dewater_excavation
actions.description: Install wellpoint or sump pumping system to keep excavation dry during foundation work.
risk_factors: high inflow rate from adjacent water body

actions.name: manual_excavation
actions.description: Hand digging for column pits, footing trimming, and utility trenches where machines cannot access.
actions.output_artifact: Trimmed footing pits to exact design level
quality_checks: Bottom bearing capacity test (plate load or DCP)

actions.name: anti_termite_treatment
actions.description: Soil poisoning with chlorpyrifos/bifenthrin at foundation trenches, sub-grade, and perimeter.
quality_checks: Certificate from licensed pest control firm

actions.name: lay_pcc
actions.description: Lay 75–100mm M10 PCC blinding layer to provide a clean working surface for reinforcement.
actions.output_artifact: Level PCC blinding ready for rebar

actions.name: fabricate_rebar
actions.description: Cut, bend, and tie reinforcement steel cages per bar-bending schedules for footings, columns, and beams.

cost_model.unit: per tonne (fabrication labour only; steel material separate)
cost_model.example_calc: 5 tonnes for foundation: 900*5*1.0*1.2 = 5400 INR labour + steel @ 72000/tonne*5 = 360000 INR material

actions.output_artifact: Fabricated rebar cages ready for placement

actions.name: install_formwork
actions.description: Erect timber, plywood, or steel formwork with props and ties for footings, columns, beams, and slabs.

cost_model.example_calc: 200 sq.ft contact area: 600*200*1.0*1.2 = 144000 INR (includes material + labour)

actions.name: pour_concrete
actions.description: Continuous concrete pour using RMC transit mixer or site batching, with needle vibrator compaction. Includes foundation, columns, beams, slabs.
actions.when_used: After rebar and formwork are ready.

cost_model.unit: per m³ (RMC M25; includes pump + placement labour)

quality_checks: Cover depth verified with cover meter

actions.name: cure_concrete
actions.description: Water curing using wet gunny bags, pond curing, or curing compound spray for minimum 14 days (28 days for critical elements).

actions.name: deshutter
actions.description: Remove formwork and props after concrete achieves adequate strength per IS:456 striking times.
risk_factors: formwork stuck due to improper oiling
actions.output_artifact: Exposed concrete surface ready for inspection

actions.name: backfill_compact
actions.description: Fill excavated areas with approved soil or murum in 150mm layers; compact each layer to 95% Proctor density using plate compactor or rammer.

actions.name: cast_plinth_beam
actions.description: Construct RCC plinth beam at plinth level to tie columns and prevent differential settlement.
actions.output_artifact: Cast plinth beam at designed level

actions.name: lay_damp_proof_course
actions.description: Apply 50mm M15 concrete or bituminous felt DPC on top of plinth beam to prevent moisture rising through walls.

actions.name: raise_columns
actions.description: Construct RCC columns floor by floor including rebar binding, formwork, pour, and cure.
actions.when_used: After plinth beam, repeated each floor.
quality_checks: Core test if cube results fail

actions.name: install_slab_formwork
actions.description: Erect soffit shuttering with cup-lock/acrow props, beam bottom, and side formwork for flat slab or beam-slab system.
actions.when_used: After columns reach slab soffit level.
risk_factors: prop spacing error causing slab deflection
actions.output_artifact: Slab soffit formwork at design level
quality_checks: Joints sealed to prevent grout loss

actions.name: fix_slab_rebar
actions.description: Place bottom and top reinforcement mesh, bent-up bars, and chair spacers per structural drawings.
risk_factors: chair spacer omission reducing top cover
quality_checks: Extra bars at column junctions per drawings

actions.name: embed_mep_conduits
actions.description: Place electrical conduits, plumbing sleeves, data/LAN conduits, and drainage stub-outs before slab pour.

actions.name: pour_slab
actions.description: Continuous pour of slab using RMC pump or bucket lift, with needle vibration and level screed finish.
risk_factors: RMC batching delay creating cold joint

actions.name: mark_wall_layout
actions.description: Transfer wall positions from architectural drawings to slab using chalk line and spirit level.
actions.when_used: After slab is cured and deshuttered.
actions.output_artifact: Wall centre lines and face lines marked on slab

actions.name: lay_bricks
actions.description: Lay 230mm / 115mm thick walls using clay bricks or AAC/hollow concrete blocks in CM 1:4 or 1:6 mortar with raking joints.

cost_model.unit: per sq.ft of wall area (material + labour)

risk_factors: poor quality bricks with high absorption

actions.name: pour_lintels
actions.description: Cast RCC lintels over door/window openings and tie-beams at sill level.
actions.when_used: During wall construction at opening levels.
quality_checks: Bar dia as per structural drawing

actions.name: install_window_door_frames
actions.description: Fix timber/UPVC/aluminium door and window frames into masonry openings with hold-fasts.

cost_model.unit: per frame (labour only; frame cost separate)

actions.name: install_electrical_conduits
actions.description: Chase walls and lay PVC/HDPE conduits, junction boxes, switch box cutouts, and earthing loops before plastering.
risk_factors: box misaligned with finished wall face
actions.output_artifact: Conduit and box layout ready for wiring
quality_checks: All boxes flush with planned plaster surface

actions.name: install_plumbing
actions.description: Install CPVC/UPVC supply lines, soil waste vent pipes, floor traps, and rainwater pipes in walls and floors.
risk_factors: pipe grade errors causing slow drainage
quality_checks: All ends capped for pressure test

actions.name: pressure_test_plumbing
actions.description: Hydraulic pressure test at 1.5× working pressure for 30 minutes to check for leaks in supply lines.
quality_checks: No pressure drop > 0.1 bar in 30 min

actions.name: install_hvac_ducting
actions.description: Install GI ducting, indoor unit brackets, condensate drain lines, and outdoor unit pads for split/VRV systems.
quality_checks: Duct leak test at 1.5× design static pressure

actions.name: apply_plaster
actions.description: Apply 12mm internal (CM 1:4) and 18–20mm external (CM 1:3) plaster with chicken mesh at RCC-masonry junctions.

actions.name: apply_waterproofing
actions.description: Apply crystalline/polymer/bitumen waterproofing on bathroom floors, terrace, water tank, and wet areas. Includes flood test.
actions.when_used: Before tiling in wet areas and after structural slab for terrace.
actions.output_artifact: Waterproofed surface with flood test passed
quality_checks: Two coats applied at right angles

actions.name: lay_flooring_sub_base
actions.description: Lay rubble filling or crusher dust under ground floor slabs and compact before screed.
actions.when_used: After backfill, before ground floor screed.

actions.name: cast_floor_screed
actions.description: Cast 40–50mm M15 screed as base for tiles or marble, with slope for drainage.
risk_factors: hollow screed if base not dampened
actions.output_artifact: Level screed at correct height for tiles

actions.name: install_tiles
actions.description: Lay floor tiles (vitrified/ceramic/marble/granite) and wall tiles in bathrooms and kitchen using adhesive mortar.

cost_model.unit: per sq.ft (labour only; tile material separate)

actions.name: grout_tiles
actions.description: Fill joints with epoxy or cement grout matching tile colour, tool flush, and clean surface.
quality_checks: Surface cleaned before grout sets hard

actions.name: install_false_ceiling
actions.description: Install gypsum board, grid, or POP false ceiling with integrated lighting provisions and access panels.
actions.when_used: After HVAC ducting, before electrical wiring pull.
actions.output_artifact: Level false ceiling with lighting openings
quality_checks: Access panels at all MEP junction boxes

actions.name: install_sanitary_fixtures
actions.description: Fix WC, washbasin, shower, bathtub, urinal, CP fittings, and accessories.

actions.name: pull_electrical_wiring
actions.description: Pull FR-LSZH copper wires through conduits, terminate at switch boxes, MCBs, and power points.
actions.when_used: After false ceiling and before paint.

actions.name: install_db_panels
actions.description: Install main LT panel, distribution boards, MCBs, RCCBs, SPDs, and earth leakage relays per load schedule.
risk_factors: missing RCCB for wet area circuits

actions.name: test_electrical
actions.description: Insulation resistance test, earth continuity test, RCD trip time test, and load test.

actions.name: obtain_bescom_connection
actions.description: Apply for and obtain permanent electricity connection from BESCOM including meter installation.

actions.name: paint_walls
actions.description: Apply gypsum putty, primer, and two coats of interior emulsion / exterior weathershield paint.
actions.when_used: After all wet works (plaster, tiles, MEP) are complete.
quality_checks: Moisture content of wall < 8% before painting

actions.name: install_joinery
actions.description: Hang door shutters, fit window panels, install modular kitchen, wardrobes, and carpentry.

actions.name: install_light_fixtures
actions.description: Fix LED lights, ceiling fans, switch plates, socket covers, and commission all circuits.

actions.name: external_plastering
actions.description: Apply two-coat external cement plaster, texture coat or stone cladding, and weathershield paint.

actions.name: construct_compound_wall
actions.description: Construct boundary wall with footing, brick/block walling, coping, plaster, paint, and entrance gate.

cost_model.unit: per rm of compound wall (2m height)

actions.name: construct_septic_stp
actions.description: Construct brick/RCC septic tank or install prefabricated STP with inlet, outlet, and vent pipe.

actions.name: construct_sump_ohwt
actions.description: Construct RCC underground sump and overhead water tank with inlet, outlet, overflow, and manhole.

actions.name: landscape_hardscape
actions.description: Grade site, lay paving blocks, garden paths, lawn, planting, outdoor lighting, and car parking.
actions.when_used: After all construction activities near completion.

cost_model.unit: per sq.ft of external open area

actions.name: final_clean
actions.description: Deep clean all rooms, remove construction debris, clean tiles, paint touch-up, sanitise bathrooms.
quality_checks: Tile acid wash done and neutralised

actions.name: punch_list_inspection
actions.description: Comprehensive walkthrough with client to record all pending items, defects, and incomplete works.

actions.name: fix_defect
actions.description: Rework items from punch list — repaint, regrout, re-plaster, fix fittings, redo faulty electrical work.
risk_factors: recurring defects indicating systemic quality issue
quality_checks: Client sign-off on each closed item

actions.name: obtain_occupation_certificate
actions.description: Apply for OC/CC from BBMP/BDA confirming construction matches sanctioned plan, with plinth level certificate and structural stability certificate.
quality_checks: As-built drawing matches sanctioned plan ± permissible deviation

actions.name: handover_keys
actions.description: Formal handover of keys, as-built drawings, equipment manuals, warranty certificates, and maintenance schedule to owner.
actions.when_used: After OC and all punch items closed.

actions.name: order_material
actions.description: Place just-in-time purchase orders for cement, steel, sand, aggregate, bricks, tiles, or other materials with lead time buffer.
actions.when_used: Before dependent tasks run out of material.

actions.name: book_equipment
actions.description: Reserve crane, excavator, concrete pump, transit mixer, or scaffolding for specific dates.
risk_factors: equipment not available on required date

actions.name: schedule_equipment
actions.description: Allocate booked equipment to specific tasks and time windows within each day to minimise idle time.

cost_model.example_calc: Concrete pump idle 2 hrs: 8000/8*2*1.2 = 2400 INR lost

actions.name: allocate_workers
actions.description: Assign specific trades (mason, carpenter, plumber, electrician, helper) to tasks based on priority.

actions.name: reassign_workers
actions.description: Shift workers from lower-priority to higher-priority tasks mid-day due to delays or critical path change.

cost_model.example_calc: No extra cost if within same day

actions.name: hire_workers
actions.description: Recruit more labour through contractor or labour mandis to increase crew size.
actions.when_used: When behind schedule or volume spike.

actions.name: approve_overtime
actions.description: Extend working hours beyond 8 hours with worker consent, additional pay, and lighting provisions.
actions.when_used: To catch up on delays or meet deadlines.
quality_checks: No more than 12 hrs total per day per worker

actions.name: create_schedule
actions.description: Build a Critical Path Method schedule with activity durations, dependencies, milestones, and resource loading.

actions.name: reschedule_tasks
actions.description: Adjust task start/end dates due to delay, resource change, or scope change. Update critical path.
actions.when_used: When cumulative delay > 5% of project duration.

cost_model.unit: penalty + replanning cost per day of delay
cost_model.example_calc: 5 day delay at 5000/day: 5000*5*1.0 = 25000 INR additional cost

quality_checks: Resource availability confirmed for revised dates

actions.name: handle_weather_delay
actions.description: Cover open concrete/brickwork, halt concreting in rain, deploy drainage pumps, reschedule activities.

cost_model.unit: per day downtime cost + protection material

actions.name: conduct_quality_inspection
actions.description: Engage a third-party quality auditor or structural inspector at key milestones: pre-pour, post-pour, post-plaster.

actions.name: conduct_cube_tests
actions.description: Test 150mm concrete cubes at 7 and 28 days per IS:516 to confirm design strength.
risk_factors: failure requiring core tests and possible demolition

actions.name: replan_project
actions.description: Full re-optimisation of schedule, resource allocation, and cost plan when project is significantly off track (> 15% slippage).

cost_model.unit: lumpsum replanning cost + sunk delay cost

actions.name: optimize_cost
actions.description: Review BOQ for cost reduction through material substitution, scope trimming, or procurement re-tendering without compromising quality.
risk_factors: quality compromise disguised as cost saving

actions.name: request_guidance
actions.description: Escalate a technical or managerial question to a senior project manager, structural engineer, or domain expert.

actions.name: do_nothing
actions.description: Consciously wait without action — optimal when downstream tasks are blocked on material/approval.
actions.when_used: When waiting is the optimal action.

cost_model.unit: per day (site standing cost: security, PM, temp power)

risk_factors: extended idle time burning budget with no progress
